Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Standard Steps Receive Order Check Credit Approve Order Issue Invoice Receive Payment Close Order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Sequence R xor_credit loop_approve_invoice P O

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: xor_credit XOR choice between Check Credit C and skip

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Meaning After receiving the order the process can either check credit or skip it entirely

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard Expectation Credit check is usually mandatory before approval invoicing to mitigate financial risk

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Skipping credit check introduces financial risk potential bad debt non compliance with internal controls or regulations

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Indicates a workaround for example rushing orders bypassing controls for VIP clients or due to system limitations

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: loop_approve_invoice LOOP with Approve Order A as do part and Issue Invoice I as redo part

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In process trees LOOP do redo means execute do then optionally execute redo and go back to do So valid traces A or A I A or A I A I A

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This allows multiple approvals and multiple invoice issuances before payment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Standard Expectation Approve once issue invoice once then wait for payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Issuing multiple invoices for the same order before payment is a major red flag duplicate invoicing revenue recognition issues customer confusion

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Inefficiency duplicate invoices accounting discrepancies potential fraud system workaround behavior

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model permits structurally valid but business invalid traces

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Conformance checking will allow highly non compliant traces and indicates poor control design potential manual workarounds lack of system enforcement revenue recognition risks

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Recommendations Enforce mandatory credit check replace loop with strict sequence or proper rework loop
